# Eroll Maxhuni

> Senior Full Stack Developer with 13 years of enterprise and freelance experience. Expert in React, TypeScript, Node.js, Angular, Next.js, NestJS, AWS microservices, PostgreSQL, and distributed systems architecture.

Eroll Maxhuni architects enterprise-grade web and mobile applications — from real-time logistics platforms to secure WebRTC systems. Available for senior full-stack roles, architecture consulting, and high-impact freelance engagements worldwide.

Primary site: https://erollmaxhuni.com
Email: info@erollmaxhuni.com
GitHub: https://github.com/341
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/eroll-maxhuni/

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:info@erollmaxhuni.com): info@erollmaxhuni.com — hiring and project inquiries
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eroll-maxhuni/): Professional profile and experience
- [GitHub](https://github.com/341): Open source and project repositories
- [Contact section](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#contact): Portfolio contact footer

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://erollmaxhuni.com/): Portfolio homepage with interactive physics hero and professional overview
- [Backend Architecture](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#architecture): AWS microservices diagram — Lambda, API Gateway, S3, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Docker
- [Case Studies](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#case-studies): Enterprise delivery highlights across logistics, ILMS, and secure communications
- [Tech Stack](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#tech-stack): Full technology ecosystem — React, Angular, Node.js, PHP legacy, databases, DevOps

## Services

- [Full Stack Development](https://erollmaxhuni.com/): React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS applications
- [Cloud & Microservices](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#architecture): AWS Lambda, API Gateway, S3, event-driven architecture, Docker
- [Mobile Development](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#case-studies): Expo and React Native delivery and driver platforms
- [Real-Time Systems](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#case-studies): WebRTC, WebSockets, secure peer-to-peer data channels

## Case Studies

- [Expo Delivery & Driver Platform](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#case-studies): Real-time fleet coordination for 2,000+ drivers — Expo, NestJS, AWS Lambda, PostgreSQL
- [React Web Components in Angular](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#case-studies): Cross-framework ILMS integration — 12 production widgets, WCAG 2.1 AA
- [WebRTC Data Management Platform](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#case-studies): End-to-end encrypted healthcare data sync — NestJS, AWS, sub-200ms P2P latency

## Technologies

- [Frontend](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#tech-stack): React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Expo, Redux, Redux Saga
- [Backend](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#tech-stack): Node.js, NestJS, Prisma, PHP (Laravel, Symfony, WordPress)
- [Data & Cloud](https://erollmaxhuni.com/#tech-stack): PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, AWS, Docker, WebRTC
